repos.description: A customized installer for GAMMA (mod for STALKER anomaly)

A.R.C.H. — Archetype framework for S.T.A.L.K.E.R. Anomaly. Create custom NPC personalities, dialogs, trade roles, and tasks via data packs.

An addon that adds new NPCs for S.T.A.L.K.E.R. Anomaly.
A clone of Grokitach's Stalker Gamma Launcher with the intent of MacOS and Linux WINE compatibility.
A mod to customize and improve the Body Health System Realistic Overhaul mod for STALKER Anomaly (Open X-Ray/Monolith) and the GAMMA mod pack.
An addon for S.T.A.L.K.E.R Anomaly that adds the ability to toggle on ground item markers and item stat windows when looking at the item.
An addon for S.T.A.L.K.E.R Anomaly that adds the ability to toggle auto run and sprint.
A detailed text overhaul mod for STALKER Anomaly (Open X-Ray/Monolith), inspired by and extending the Massive Text Overhaul mod for STALKER Gamma.

A realistic overhaul for STALKER Anomaly's Body Health System featuring Tarkov-inspired mechanics - no temporary HP, functional painkillers, limb-specific damage, surgery requirements, and weapon sway integration for an immersive medical experience.

A DXML script mod for STALKER Anomaly (Open X-Ray/Monolith) that automatically patches text and associated user interface elements to have proper vertical alignment and additionally supports custom override values for elements by scope selector. Works in-engine and is compatible with all UI mods.

A script mod for STALKER Anomaly (Open X-Ray/Monolith) to patch various strings before presentation for improved aesthetics and typographic consistency. Handles item names, descriptions, and custom overrides in XML localization files.
An implementation of the Stalker G.A.M.M.A. Installer that works on both Windows and Linux

A patch mod for STALKER Anomaly (Open X-Ray/Monolith) to make Enhanced GUI, DynaHUD, and the Body Health System compatible with some opinionated changes included.
A mod for STALKER Anomaly (Open X-Ray) that overhauls items used for cooking. Creates distinct cookers in separate tiers and fuel usage types fitting levels of player progression.
A patch mod for STALKER Anomaly (Open X-Ray/Monolith) to make Enhanced GUI, DynaHUD, Body Health System, and the Body Health System Realistic Overhaul compatible.

A mod for Stalker Anomaly / GAMMA that add a type of fetch quest allowing stalkers to retire, leaving their weapons to you. It's another way to obtain weapons belong to your own faction.
A semi-recreation of G.A.M.M.A.'s NPC and New Game loadouts to, hopefully, decrease weapon bloat, make NPC rank matter more for what they use and provide more interesting starting choices.
